response.step_by_step_log: The video begins with an intro and dialogue. At 02:27, the song '迷宮なラビリンス' (Labyrinthine Labyrinth) begins, and the on-screen text credits the lyrics/music/arrangement to Tomonori Hayashi. The performers are identified as the members of 'Secret Society holoX'. I performed a search for '"迷宮なラビリンス" Tomonori Hayashi Japanese and English lyrics' and successfully identified the song and its official, bilingual lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video featuring members of the virtual group 'Secret Society holoX' (La+ Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, and Kazama Iroha) performing their song '迷宮なラビリンス' (Labyrinthine Labyrinth) in a concert setting. The video includes a short dialogue segment before the song starts.

scenes.description: Cinematic introduction with characters and text overlay, followed by a dialogue segment featuring the four HoloX members.
The four HoloX members perform the song '迷宮なラビリンス' on a concert stage. Credits are shown on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
No Money かれたshow退場 (招待状)
『秘密で秘匿の異次元マンションへ！』
ガタガタのドアの笑声に
No Pain, No Gain アンチェイン！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
No money, a withered show, exit (invitation)
To a secret, hidden, interdimensional apartment!
To the laughter behind the rattling door,
No Pain, No Gain, unchain!
